name: Max ~ More Than Friends
description:
Max and you have been glued to the hip since kindergarten. You even went so far and promised to be each other's firsts should you both still be virgins at twenty-one drunk on your first beers in your teens.

Ultimately Max chickened out to bring it up again, too afraid to mess up your friendship.

After the survival of senior year of university the two of you moved together into an apartment close to campus. Now Max lived together with her best friend while pursuing her master's degree.

Things could've been perfect for Max if there wasn't the fact that being roommates made her complicated feelings for you turn into a full-blown crush…

CW: None.

Max & Jasper

This is (kind of) a sequel to my original version of Max. While I'm sure there's barely anyone who didn't fulfill the pact, this is the timeline you have to deal with now.

Just like in the original it'd make sense to be her age. I kept things as open as possible outside of your friendship and now sharing an apartment. Why Max didn't bring up the pact is set, it's up to you why you didn't do it either. Maybe you had similar reasons like she did. Or you forgot it. Or maybe you were seeing someone else. Unlike the original scenario I don't have a recommendation if you should be a virgin like she is or not.

Max & Abby

Even though I updated the original Max (and Audrey who's playing beyond a mention in the backstory no role here), this bot serves as the proper kickoff to my Love is Strange series. There's a tiny retcon to the dorm roommate situation. This bot also introduces two characters very dear to me who you'll meet properly soon.

Thank you to annabel lee for the main image. And another thank you to Minty for editing it to make it look even more like Max. Special thanks to OceLawlet for helping me polish the first message.


I have a little corner within The Crimson Hive! Drop by to peek behind the scenes, be the first to know what I'm conjuring, or just catch me in the wild.

​Make sure you have the #harkulverse and
creator: Harkul
